parser_claim: Cantonese property/adjectival predicates can predicate directly without an overt copula.
source_proposition: Predicative adjectives behave like verbs and do not require 係; the copula is not used when the predicate is an adjective.
implementation_effect: License an overt copula-less property-predicate subtype when the lexical predicate is independently identified.
forbidden_inference: Do not insert a hidden copula or infer that every V-like token is a property predicate.

parser_claim: Cantonese stative/property words do not form a clean category separable from all verbs by one label.
source_proposition: The article reports complex overlap among purported adjective/adjectival-verb categories and proposes interacting syntactic, semantic, morphological, and phonological features.
implementation_effect: Treat the plugin’s stative label as a controlled representation requiring lexical and construction-specific evidence, not a single natural class licensed by one heuristic.
forbidden_inference: Do not import the article’s full feature analysis or claim that all Cantonese adjectives are syntactically identical.

parser_claim: Stative verbs may share adjective-like modification while retaining verb-like properties.
source_proposition: The synopsis states that stative verbs share properties with adjectives and verbs and may be modified like adjectives.
implementation_effect: Preserve source-visible subtype distinctions rather than merging all stative, adjectival, and lexicalized forms into one construction claim.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer unrestricted object-taking or degree modification for every item classified stative by the runtime.

parser_claim: Positive neutral predicative-adjective clauses commonly involve overt degree modification, so a bare-property and degree-marked property predicate should not be silently equated.
source_proposition: The synopsis describes predicative adjectives as requiring an adverb of degree and gives (very) comfortable as illustration.
implementation_effect: Represent overt degree material and distinguish it from a bare predicate; do not erase or invent the degree word.
forbidden_inference: Do not convert the synopsis generalization into a categorical ban on all contextually licensed bare property predicates.

parser_claim: The active wrapper assigns one StativePredicate label to bare, degree-marked, and negated stative spans.
source_proposition: The same construction type is emitted for one-token statives, degree + stative, and 唔 + stative despite different overt structures.
implementation_effect: Split the research claims and any future node semantics by overt structure even if an internal umbrella remains for display.
forbidden_inference: Do not change runtime behavior in CP021B-R8.

parser_claim: The runtime stative decision extends beyond lexicalized and ordinary-stative registries to any V bundle with can_head_comment=true.
source_proposition: Bundle-based and fallback label/syntax tests can classify tokens as stative without pattern-specific external construction evidence.
implementation_effect: Keep bundle affordances as internal routing evidence only; require external evidence before presenting the class as Cantonese grammar.
forbidden_inference: Do not cite runtime feature bundles as independent support for language productivity.

parser_claim: A property-predicate fragment and a subject-predicate clause are different representation levels.
source_proposition: The parser separately builds StativePredicate fragments and SubjectPredicateClause structures but the language label does not encode that distinction.
implementation_effect: Keep predicate-internal structure separate from clause-level subject predication and from topic-comment analysis.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a missing subject for a standalone property predicate.

parser_claim: Direct negation of an adjectival/stative predicate is possible without a copula, but it is structurally a negated subtype rather than evidence for a homogeneous umbrella.
exact_locator: p. 452 example Ni go neujai m leng; pp. 449-454 discussion
source_proposition: Yip gives a copula-less adjective predicate directly preceded by 唔 and treats adjectives/stative verbs among the categories negated by 唔.
implementation_effect: Retain the visible negator and predicate as a separate negated-property profile.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that the lexical-prefix analysis is the only valid syntax or that all negators are interchangeable.

parser_claim: Overt degree modifiers precede Cantonese adjective/property predicates.
exact_locator: p. 6 section 4.6, examples 好 悶 and 非常 好
source_proposition: The paper identifies degree modification as a common adjective collocation and segments 好, 幾, and 非常 as separate words.
implementation_effect: License overt degree + property-predicate structures while preserving both tokens.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a hidden degree marker or that the cited list exhausts Cantonese degree expressions.

parser_claim: Degree marking is central to neutral predicative-adjective descriptions.
source_proposition: Predicative adjectives are described as verb-like, copula-less, and degree-modified in neutral predication.
implementation_effect: Keep degree-marked property predication distinct from an unmodified predicate.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that discourse can never license an unmodified property word.

parser_claim: The category template licenses a required degree plus a second optional generic degree before an ordinary stative.
source_proposition: The template degree! + degree? + ordinary_stative_predicate! is broader than the source-mapped single overt degree patterns.
implementation_effect: Narrow any future implementation to independently attested modifier sequences and preserve each overt modifier.
forbidden_inference: Do not authorize arbitrary stacking of two degree words.

parser_claim: The active fallback recognizes 好, 太, 幾, and 有啲 as one undifferentiated degree slot.
source_proposition: The reviewed sources directly support 好, 幾, and 非常; this batch did not independently map every runtime member or their distributional differences.
implementation_effect: Keep the runtime inventory provisional and research each modifier or modifier class before productive promotion.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that 太 and 有啲 are ungrammatical; their exact construction claims remain unmapped here.

parser_claim: Degree modifiers and lexical predicates remain overtly separable in the mapped examples.
exact_locator: p. 6 lines/examples for 好 悶 and 非常 好
source_proposition: The annotation treats degree markers as separate words rather than subparts of the following adjective.
implementation_effect: Preserve visible degree material as its own child or token relation.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that orthographic spacing exists in ordinary Cantonese writing or fixes the full syntactic analysis.

parser_claim: The dedicated DegreeStativePredicate template and the active StativePredicate wrapper currently assign inconsistent node types to the same structural family.
source_proposition: One registry path names DegreeStativePredicate, while the active wrapper emits StativePredicate for degree + stative.
implementation_effect: Resolve the node boundary and label policy before implementation; source mapping alone does not select one runtime representation.
forbidden_inference: Do not activate the dormant/specialized template or rewrite accepted parses in R8.

parser_claim: Ordinary 唔 can directly negate an adjective/stative predicate without 係.
exact_locator: pp. 451-454; p. 452 example Ni go neujai m leng
source_proposition: Yip documents 唔 immediately before adjective/stative predicates and gives This girl is not beautiful without a copula.
implementation_effect: License overt 唔 + independently identified property predicate as a narrow subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not add a hidden copula or normalize the predicate into an English adjective category.

parser_claim: The mapped ordinary-negation evidence is specifically for 唔, not a generic interchangeable negator slot.
source_proposition: The article analyzes distribution of Cantonese 唔 across verbs, adjectives/stative verbs, prepositions, and some adverbs.
implementation_effect: Preserve the actual negator identity and establish separate evidence for 冇, 未, 咪, or other negative forms.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every runtime negator can negate every property predicate.

parser_claim: The category template uses generic negator! even though the active fallback only recognizes 唔.
source_proposition: The broad registry claim and active runtime surface condition are not equivalent.
implementation_effect: Narrow the language claim to overt 唔 until other negative subtypes receive exact source mappings.
forbidden_inference: Do not broaden accepted behavior or collapse aspectual, existential, and prohibitive negation.

parser_claim: Negated property predication is emitted under the broad StativePredicate type rather than the dedicated NegatedStativePredicate label.
source_proposition: The registry and wrapper disagree about whether negation creates a specialized construction node.
implementation_effect: Resolve label policy separately from the supported overt sequence; retain children and scope provenance.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the current node label as linguistic evidence.

parser_claim: Copula absence with an adjectival predicate remains compatible under negation.
exact_locator: p. 27 entry (71), read with p. 24 entry (57)
source_proposition: The synopsis states that 係 is not used when the predicate is an adjective and that predicative adjectives behave verb-like.
implementation_effect: Keep negated adjective/property predication copula-less unless an overt copula is independently present in another construction.
forbidden_inference: Do not use this general statement to license every lexical item after 唔.

parser_claim: 好食 can be an opaque lexical adjective/property unit rather than compositionally good + eat.
source_proposition: The paper treats 好食 delicious as one opaque unit and explicitly contrasts it with a compositional reading.
implementation_effect: Preserve dictionary/corpus-supported lexical-unit analysis for 好食 where context selects that reading.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every 好+verb string is lexicalized or that segmentation alone fixes clause syntax.

parser_claim: Degree modifiers can be separate words before adjective/property predicates.
source_proposition: The paper separately segments degree modifiers such as 好, 幾, and 非常 before adjectives.
implementation_effect: A degree word may modify an independently established lexical property unit, but both boundaries must remain visible.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that 好 + 好食 specifically is licensed or pragmatically neutral from the separate general facts alone.

parser_claim: The exact template example 好 + 好食 lacks direct construction-level attestation in the reviewed source set.
source_proposition: The sources independently support degree modification and lexical 好食, but no inspected example establishes the plugin’s exact combination or a productive class of degree + lexicalized 好X forms.
implementation_effect: Keep the label quarantined or lexically enumerated pending corpus examples and native judgments.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that 好好食 is unnatural; this is a source-mapping gap.

parser_claim: A registry template is not evidence that the specialized label is active or necessary.
exact_locator: main.js lines 2631-2635 and active wrapper lines 15222-15248
source_proposition: The active wrapper can absorb degree + stative material under StativePredicate, while the specialized label appears in the template registry.
implementation_effect: Decide merge versus narrow lexical subtype only after accepted-output inventory and exact attestation review.
forbidden_inference: Do not activate or retire code in this research-only batch.

parser_claim: 難食 is an opaque lexical property unit meaning unpalatable, not ordinary overt negation.
source_proposition: The paper treats 難食 as one non-compositional adjective unit and rejects the literal difficult to eat interpretation for that reading.
implementation_effect: Represent 難食 as a lexical predicate; do not encode 難 as a negator or infer a separate negative-syntax construction.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every 難+verb combination is opaque or that all uses of 難食 share one sense.

parser_claim: An independently lexicalized property predicate may be compositionally negated by overt 唔.
source_proposition: Yip documents 唔 before verbs and adjective/stative predicates.
implementation_effect: Allow a separately established lexical property unit to occur under ordinary overt 唔 negation, with the two pieces preserved.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that Yip specifically attests 唔好食 or validates the plugin’s label name.

parser_claim: The current label conflates a negative-meaning lexical unit such as 難食 with compositional negation such as 唔 + 好食.
source_proposition: Two templates with different morphology, tokenization, and scope share one construction type.
implementation_effect: Split lexical negative meaning from syntactic negation; retire the homogeneous language claim even if internal grouping remains.
forbidden_inference: Do not remove either surface form or change accepted tokenization in R8.

parser_claim: 唔好 is also a Cantonese prohibitive marker distinct from ordinary negator 唔.
source_proposition: The study distinguishes prohibitive 咪/唔好 from the ordinary negation marker 唔.
implementation_effect: Maintain a competing prohibitive analysis for strings where 唔好 precedes a verb.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every string beginning 唔好 is prohibitive or that the abstract resolves all tokenization contexts.

parser_claim: Bare 唔好食 has at least the parser-relevant split ambiguity 唔 + 好食 versus 唔好 + 食.
source_proposition: The runtime already stores both candidate analyses and marks the bare string NeedsContext.
implementation_effect: Preserve ambiguity rather than forcing the lexical-stative or prohibitive branch without context.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote the current heuristic’s object/topic conditions as externally validated grammar.

parser_claim: Context is relevant to choosing compositional versus opaque segmentation for adjective-verb strings.
source_proposition: The paper distinguishes compositional and opaque adjective-verb combinations and notes that annotators often disambiguate them in context.
implementation_effect: Record lexical segmentation and syntactic parse as context-sensitive alternatives when the surface permits more than one analysis.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that the paper specifically adjudicates 唔好食 or supplies the plugin’s contextual decision rules.

parser_claim: NegatedLexicalizedStative should not survive as one externally asserted construction family.
exact_locator: R8 construction comparison across main.js lines 2620-2629, 6834-6892, and mapped sources
source_proposition: External evidence supports a lexical 難食 unit, ordinary 唔 negation, and a separate 唔好 prohibitive marker, not their merger under one language label.
implementation_effect: Retire or split the label in a future authorized implementation while preserving overt forms and ambiguity provenance.
forbidden_inference: Do not implement the retirement in CP021B-R8.

parser_claim: Cantonese permits a subject followed by an adjective/property predicate without an overt copula.
source_proposition: Predicative adjectives behave verb-like and the copula is not used with adjective predicates.
implementation_effect: The overt language form can be represented under a general subject-predicate clause with a property-predicate subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not insert a hidden copula or assume the source motivates the exact dormant label.

parser_claim: Calling the predicate adjectival is not the only supported categorical analysis.
source_proposition: Francis and Matthews reject a simple adjective versus adjectival-verb division in favor of interacting features and semantic classes.
implementation_effect: Use a theory-neutral property/stative subtype or record competing analyses; do not make the node name an asserted fact.
forbidden_inference: Do not claim the article requires Canto Span to classify all such predicates as verbs.

parser_claim: AdjectivalPredicateClause is dormant/registry-level and overlaps the active SubjectPredicateClause stative subtype.
source_proposition: The active parser already uses SubjectPredicateClause for subject + stative predicate while the separate adjectival clause label has no mapped active behavior.
implementation_effect: Merge or retire the dormant label unless future evidence establishes a distinct parser-relevant boundary.
forbidden_inference: Do not activate it or reinterpret accepted outputs in R8.

parser_claim: A broad bare subject + adjective template would overstate the neutral-predication evidence because degree marking is often required or expected.
source_proposition: The synopsis states that predicative adjectives require an adverb of degree in the described neutral profile.
implementation_effect: Any future clause template must preserve overt degree modification and distinguish discourse-sensitive bare cases.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the statement as a universal ban or fabricate an unspoken degree word.
